title: Uruguayan Aubergine Gratin
description: A rich and flavorful side dish featuring roasted aubergine and a tangy Uruguayan twist.

ingredients.name: Uruguayan cheese
ingredients.notes: or similar type of cheddar or mozzarella

instructions: Cut the roasted aubergine into 1-inch slices.
Brush the aubergine slices with olive oil and season with salt and black pepper.
In a separate bowl, combine grated Uruguayan cheese and molten mozzarella.
Arrange the aubergine slices in a baking dish and top with the cheese mixture.
Sprinkle grated breadcrumbs over the top.
Bake in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown.
Garnish with chopped parsley, if desired.
